content: Treating a unified graph-integrated large language model as a collective of micro biological agents, where each node-entity relation in the unified graph acts as a specialized biological agent that exerts power to produce targeted effects on the model’s reasoning process. This framework redefines LLM reasoning as a coordinated agentic ecosystem rather than a single monolithic generation process.
source_topics: Large language model integration with unified graph
trigger_topic: Large language model integration with unified graph
